categories.name: Espresso
categories.description: Built on Starbucks Espresso Roast or the milder Blonde Espresso.

categories.name: Brewed Coffee
categories.description: Drip-brewed, filter coffee — including cold formats.

categories.name: Frappuccino® Blended Beverages
categories.description: Blended ice drinks in coffee and crème (non-coffee) bases.

categories.name: Refreshers
categories.description: Fruit-forward, gently caffeinated drinks made with green coffee extract instead of espresso.

categories.name: Tea & Teavana
categories.description: Hot and iced tea, matcha, and steamed-milk tea drinks.

categories.name: Iced & Shaken Espresso
categories.description: Espresso shaken over ice, often with flavored syrups.
examples: Iced Brown Sugar Oatmilk Shaken Espresso

categories.name: Seasonal & Limited-Time
categories.description: Rotating drinks tied to a season or cultural moment.

categories.name: Bottled / Ready-to-Drink
categories.description: Packaged for grocery and convenience channels via the PepsiCo (North America RTD) and Nestlé (global CPG) partnerships.

categories.name: Reserve® / Roastery Exclusives
categories.description: Small-lot, single-origin coffees and specialty preparations available at Reserve bars and Roasteries.

buildHierarchy.description: How a Starbucks drink is assembled, from raw foundation to the cup handed to the customer. Baristas are actually trained to build the cup in call-out order: temperature, size, syrup, milk/modifications, drink name, extras — but the physical construction of the drink itself follows the layers below.

steps.title: Foundation
steps.description: The raw material: 100% arabica beans, roasted at one of six global roasting plants.

steps.title: Liquid Base
steps.description: How the foundation is turned into a liquid.

steps.title: Temperature & Format
steps.description: Hot, iced, or blended — this decides the cup and prep method.

steps.title: Milk / Dairy Alternative
steps.description: Steamed, cold-foamed, or poured over ice.

steps.title: Flavor
steps.description: Syrups and sauces added to taste.

steps.title: Finished Drink
options: e.g., a Grande Iced Oatmilk Caramel Macchiato with light ice and extra drizzle
